title: Untethered Single Cell Grippers for Active Biopsy.
author: Jin Q Yang Y Jackson JA Yoon C Gracias DH
content: S-EPMC7405256 PMC7405256 Untethered Single Cell Grippers for Active Biopsy. Single cell manipulation is important in biosensing, biorobotics, and quantitative cell analysis.
